---
id: resolve-translation-set-keep-existing-2
title: "Resolve all translation conflicts (keep existing)"
description: "Resolves all translation conflicts for provided language. The old translations will be kept."
sidebar_label: "Resolve all translation conflicts (keep existing)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Resolve all translation conflicts (keep existing)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/import/result/languages/{languageId}/resolve-all/set-keep-existing"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Resolves all translation conflicts for provided language. The old translations will be kept.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
